articles.title: Chiliz: This update could set the pace for more demand as CHZ bottoms out
articles.description: CHZ’s MVRV ratio just bounced back from its bottom range. This confirmed that there was significant accumulation in the last few days, hence the upside reflected the profitability of those that bought at recent lows.

articles.title: XRP May Have Just Become One Of The Biggest Threats to Big Banks Following Ripple’s Historic SEC Win
articles.description: Historically, the banking industry's dominance over global transactions has been unassailable. However, the emergence of blockchain technology and the potential harboured by cryptocurrencies like XRP have set in motion a seismic shift that is upending this age-old paradigm.

articles.title: Shiba Inu Layer 2 Poised for Massive Takeoff, Here's When
articles.description: Excitement remains for prospects of Shiba Inu Layer 2 blockchain

articles.title: $0.001 SHIB Price ‘Closer Than Ever’ As Shiba Inu’s Shibarium Bridge Sees Skyrocketing Numbers
articles.description: After a chaotic start, Shibarium is now fully functional. Both the Shibarium mainnet and connecting bridge were briefly paused due to software bugs that caused over $1.7 million in customer assets to be stuck.

articles.title: Cardano Bulls Charge Toward $0.27: Fakeout or Breakout?
articles.description: A glimmer of optimism emerges on the horizon as Cardano Bulls reclaim control.
